data.description:
This is a section from the P Rule (pages 265–270). While this layer is placed, creatures can pass through walls. The layer destroyed by force damage to it. Time: action
Casting: 3 yards.
Range: 120 feet.
AoO: Creature Ld6 takes light or poison damage. A save halves the damage.
Components: V,S, M(a bit fleece jade worth 50 gp).
The passwall spell can be cast through another wall of force or a similar spell of equal or higher level that allows a portal to be opened. The condition must specify when this occurs.
A powerful spell used to end the magical effects on a creature or in an area.
